ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Workclass of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight, number of people the entry represents */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Educational level of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status with the head of the household */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains recorded by the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses recorded by the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Income level of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the individual is employed */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "education_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_years" INTEGER /* Number of years in the current marital status */,
  "previous_occupation" TEXT /* Previous occupation of the individual */,
  "previous_income_id" INTEGER /* Previous income level of the individual */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the individual */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individual */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Veteran status of the individual */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_previous_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_income_id") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the workclass */,
  "is_government" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the workclass is related to government employment */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for individuals in this workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the educational level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the educational level */,
  "average_years" INTEGER /* Average number of years required to achieve this educational level */,
  "is_higher_education" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this educational level is considered higher education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income level */,
  "average_age" INTEGER /* Average age of individuals in this income level */,
  "average_education_years" INTEGER /* Average number of years of education for individuals in this income level */,
  "average_hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week for individuals in this income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)
column_names: Final weight, number of people the entry represents
Relationship status with the head of the household
